title: Rewrite as a quadratic
text: Rearrange the equation into the standard quadratic form $${acos}^2$$ $$x$$ + bcos $$x$$ + c $$=$$ $$0$$.

title: Solve for cos $$x$$
text: Solve the quadratic equation for cos $$x$$ (e.g., by factoring or quadratic formula).

title: Identify valid solutions for $$x$$
text: Consider the valid range of cos $$x$$ and find the smallest solution for $$x$$ in $$(0$$, $$2\pi)$$.
